correction_notes: CRITICAL ERROR IN PREVIOUS VERSION: The original design depicted three vertical ROCK FORMATIONS with WATERFALLS cascading down their faces - this is fundamentally WRONG. 'Fallingwater' is a PROPER NOUN referring to Frank Lloyd Wright's 1935 architectural masterpiece, NOT a literal description of falling water. The corrected design shows the ARCHITECTURE: stacked HORIZONTAL cantilevered concrete terraces hovering over Bear Run stream. Key corrections: (1) Replaced vertical rock columns with horizontal terrace planes, (2) Changed primary color to ochre/buff for concrete, (3) Added Cherokee red steel accents, (4) Moved water to BOTTOM ONLY - the stream flows BENEATH the building, (5) Added central stone chimney as vertical anchor, (6) Maintained asymmetric cantilever arrangement true to Wright's design. The Saguaro style influence is now expressed through the warm earth palette and bold geometric clarity, NOT through vertical emphasis.

variations.name: Fallingwater Refined
variations.description: A refined architectural transom depicting Frank Lloyd Wright's Fallingwater house in the warm Saguaro style palette. The design features three stacked horizontal cantilevered terraces in warm ochre concrete tones extending asymmetrically from a central sandstone chimney mass. Cherokee red steel window bands accent each level. The terraces hover dramatically over Bear Run stream (teal water at bottom). Forest vegetation frames the composition at periphery. The overall reading is strongly HORIZONTAL - like desert mesa strata - honoring both Wright's Prairie School vocabulary and the Saguaro style's bold geometric warmth.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Desert Sky Gradient (Saguaro warmth) -->
    <linearGradient id="desertSky" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8C895"/>
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#F5DEB3"/>
      <stop offset="80%" stop-color="#DEB887"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D2B48C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Concrete Terrace Gradients (Ochre/Buff) -->
    <linearGradient id="concreteMain" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E5D4B3"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="concreteLight" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F0E6D0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E5D4B3"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="concreteShadow" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B8956E"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Sandstone Chimney Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="sandstone" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9C8B75"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Cherokee Red for steel -->
    <linearGradient id="cherokeeRed" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A52A2A"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8B4513"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Stream Water (Bottom only) -->
    <linearGradient id="streamWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5BA3B5" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Forest Vegetation -->
    <linearGradient id="forest" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Rock Outcropping -->
    <linearGradient id="rockBase" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5C4033"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Glass texture filter -->
    <filter id="glassTexture" x="0%" y="0%" width="100%" height="100%">
      <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
      <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" result="mono"/>
      <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="mono" mode="soft-light"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background - Desert Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#desertSky)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame - zinc caming -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Left side framing -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <polygon points="5,25 35,20 45,35 50,50 45,65 35,75 25,75 15,70 5,65" fill="url(#forest)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <polygon points="10,30 25,28 30,40 28,55 20,60 10,55" fill="#3B6B4A" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="5,25 35,20 45,35 50,50 45,65 35,75 25,75 15,70 5,65" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Right side framing -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <polygon points="315,22 285,18 275,32 270,48 275,62 285,72 295,72 305,68 315,62" fill="url(#forest)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <polygon points="310,28 295,26 290,38 292,52 300,58 310,53" fill="#3B6B4A" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="315,22 285,18 275,32 270,48 275,62 285,72 295,72 305,68 315,62" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- ROCK OUTCROPPING BASE (under the house) -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <polygon points="115,72 130,68 145,75 160,70 175,76 190,72 205,78 205,95 115,95" fill="url(#rockBase)"/>
    <polygon points="125,74 140,72 155,77 155,95 125,95" fill="#6B5344" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="165,73 180,70 195,75 195,95 165,95" fill="#5C4033" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="115,72 130,68 145,75 160,70 175,76 190,72 205,78 205,95 115,95" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- CENTRAL STONE CHIMNEY (Vertical anchor rising through terraces) -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <rect x="150" y="8" width="22" height="67" fill="url(#sandstone)"/>
    <!-- Chimney texture lines -->
    <line x1="150" y1="18" x2="172" y2="18" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="28" x2="172" y2="28" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="38" x2="172" y2="38" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="48" x2="172" y2="48" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="172" y2="58" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="150" y="8" width="22" height="67" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- UPPER TERRACE (Level 3) - Extends LEFT from chimney -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="65" y="18" width="85" height="10" fill="url(#concreteMain)" rx="1"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="65" y="16" width="85" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLight)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="65" y="28" width="85" height="2" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="68" y="28" width="80" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="68" y="28" width="80" height="3" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="65" y="16" width="85" height="14" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- MIDDLE TERRACE (Level 2) - Extends RIGHT from chimney (larger, main living level) -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="172" y="32" width="95" height="12" fill="url(#concreteMain)" rx="1"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="172" y="30" width="95" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLight)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="172" y="44" width="95" height="2" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="175" y="44" width="88" height="4" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="175" y="44" width="88" height="4" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="172" y="30" width="95" height="18" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- LOWER TERRACE (Level 1) - Extends LEFT from chimney (guest house level) -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="55" y="50" width="95" height="14" fill="url(#concreteMain)" rx="1"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="55" y="48" width="95" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLight)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="55" y="64" width="95" height="3" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="58" y="64" width="90" height="5" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="58" y="64" width="90" height="5" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="55" y="48" width="95" height="21" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- LOWEST TERRACE EXTENSION - Small cantilever toward water -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <rect x="172" y="58" width="45" height="10" fill="url(#concreteMain)" rx="1"/>
    <rect x="172" y="56" width="45" height="3" fill="url(#concreteLight)" rx="1"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="175" y="68" width="40" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="172" y="56" width="45" height="15" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- STREAM/BEAR RUN - Water at BOTTOM only -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <rect x="4" y="82" width="312" height="14" fill="url(#streamWater)"/>
    <!-- Water surface highlights -->
    <ellipse cx="80" cy="87" rx="30" ry="3" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.4"/>
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="88" rx="25" ry="2" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.5"/>
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="86" rx="35" ry="3" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Waterfall hint (small cascade at rock edge) -->
    <rect x="200" y="78" width="6" height="8" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="4" y="82" width="312" height="14" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- HORIZONTAL LEADING LINES (Prairie rhythm) -->
  <line x1="4" y1="82" x2="316" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="4" y1="75" x2="55" y2="75" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
  <line x1="217" y1="75" x2="316" y2="75" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>

  <!-- Vertical division caming (minimal - horizontal emphasis) -->
  <line x1="55" y1="48" x2="55" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="267" y1="30" x2="267" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Corner accents (vegetation green top, water teal bottom) -->
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
</svg>

variations.name: Fallingwater Animated
variations.description: An animated version of the corrected Fallingwater transom with subtle effects that honor the architecture. Features gentle water flow in Bear Run stream below, soft light shimmer on the ochre concrete terraces suggesting sunlight, and a subtle heat shimmer above the warm stone chimney. Cherokee red steel bands have a gentle warm glow. The animations emphasize the HORIZONTAL planes and the sense of the building hovering over water - NOT waterfalls cascading down.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Desert Sky Gradient (Saguaro warmth) -->
    <linearGradient id="desertSkyAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8C895"/>
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#F5DEB3"/>
      <stop offset="80%" stop-color="#DEB887"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D2B48C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Concrete Terrace Gradients (Ochre/Buff) -->
    <linearGradient id="concreteMainAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E5D4B3">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#E5D4B3;#EDE3C8;#E5D4B3" dur="6s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="concreteLightAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#F0E6D0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E5D4B3"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Sandstone Chimney Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="sandstoneAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9C8B75"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Cherokee Red for steel (animated glow) -->
    <linearGradient id="cherokeeRedAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A52A2A">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#A52A2A;#B83535;#A52A2A" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8B4513"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Stream Water (Animated flow) -->
    <linearGradient id="streamWaterAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5BA3B5" stop-opacity="0.9">
        <animate attributeName="offset" values="0%;0.1%;0%" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Forest Vegetation -->
    <linearGradient id="forestAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Rock Outcropping -->
    <linearGradient id="rockBaseAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5C4033"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Water flow pattern -->
    <pattern id="streamFlowPattern" x="0" y="0" width="40" height="10" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect width="40" height="10" fill="#4A90A4"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="5" rx="8" ry="2" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.5">
        <animate attributeName="cx" values="10;50" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </ellipse>
      <ellipse cx="30" cy="5" rx="6" ry="1.5" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.4">
        <animate attributeName="cx" values="30;70" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </ellipse>
    </pattern>

    <!-- Glass texture filter -->
    <filter id="glassTextureAnim" x="0%" y="0%" width="100%" height="100%">
      <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
      <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" result="mono"/>
      <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="mono" mode="soft-light"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Heat shimmer filter for chimney -->
    <filter id="heatShimmerAnim" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="110%" height="110%">
      <feTurbulence type="turbulence" baseFrequency="0.03" numOctaves="2" result="noise">
        <animate attributeName="baseFrequency" values="0.03;0.04;0.03" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </feTurbulence>
      <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="1" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <style>
    @keyframes waterRipple {
      0% { rx: 25; opacity: 0.4; }
      50% { rx: 35; opacity: 0.2; }
      100% { rx: 25; opacity: 0.4; }
    }
    @keyframes sunlightGlow {
      0% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 0.85; }
      100% { opacity: 0.7; }
    }
    @keyframes gentleFloat {
      0% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-0.5px); }
      100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .ripple {
      animation: waterRipple 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .sunlit {
      animation: sunlightGlow 5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .hover-effect {
      animation: gentleFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
  </style>

  <!-- Background - Desert Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#desertSkyAnim)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame - zinc caming -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Left side framing -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <polygon points="5,25 35,20 45,35 50,50 45,65 35,75 25,75 15,70 5,65" fill="url(#forestAnim)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <polygon points="10,30 25,28 30,40 28,55 20,60 10,55" fill="#3B6B4A" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="5,25 35,20 45,35 50,50 45,65 35,75 25,75 15,70 5,65" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Right side framing -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <polygon points="315,22 285,18 275,32 270,48 275,62 285,72 295,72 305,68 315,62" fill="url(#forestAnim)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <polygon points="310,28 295,26 290,38 292,52 300,58 310,53" fill="#3B6B4A" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="315,22 285,18 275,32 270,48 275,62 285,72 295,72 305,68 315,62" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- ROCK OUTCROPPING BASE (under the house) -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <polygon points="115,72 130,68 145,75 160,70 175,76 190,72 205,78 205,95 115,95" fill="url(#rockBaseAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="125,74 140,72 155,77 155,95 125,95" fill="#6B5344" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="165,73 180,70 195,75 195,95 165,95" fill="#5C4033" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <polygon points="115,72 130,68 145,75 160,70 175,76 190,72 205,78 205,95 115,95" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- CENTRAL STONE CHIMNEY (Vertical anchor with heat shimmer) -->
  <g filter="url(#heatShimmerAnim)">
    <rect x="150" y="8" width="22" height="67" fill="url(#sandstoneAnim)"/>
    <!-- Chimney texture lines -->
    <line x1="150" y1="18" x2="172" y2="18" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="28" x2="172" y2="28" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="38" x2="172" y2="38" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="48" x2="172" y2="48" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="172" y2="58" stroke="#6B5344" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="150" y="8" width="22" height="67" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- UPPER TERRACE (Level 3) - Extends LEFT from chimney -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)" class="hover-effect">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="65" y="18" width="85" height="10" fill="url(#concreteMainAnim)" rx="1" class="sunlit"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="65" y="16" width="85" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLightAnim)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="65" y="28" width="85" height="2" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="68" y="28" width="80" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRedAnim)"/>
  <rect x="68" y="28" width="80" height="3" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="65" y="16" width="85" height="14" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- MIDDLE TERRACE (Level 2) - Extends RIGHT from chimney -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)" class="hover-effect" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="172" y="32" width="95" height="12" fill="url(#concreteMainAnim)" rx="1" class="sunlit"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="172" y="30" width="95" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLightAnim)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="172" y="44" width="95" height="2" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="175" y="44" width="88" height="4" fill="url(#cherokeeRedAnim)"/>
  <rect x="175" y="44" width="88" height="4" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="172" y="30" width="95" height="18" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- LOWER TERRACE (Level 1) - Extends LEFT from chimney -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)" class="hover-effect" style="animation-delay: 1s;">
    <!-- Main terrace plane -->
    <rect x="55" y="50" width="95" height="14" fill="url(#concreteMainAnim)" rx="1" class="sunlit"/>
    <!-- Parapet (rounded bullnose edge) -->
    <rect x="55" y="48" width="95" height="4" fill="url(#concreteLightAnim)" rx="2"/>
    <!-- Shadow beneath -->
    <rect x="55" y="64" width="95" height="3" fill="#B8956E" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Cherokee Red window band below terrace -->
  <rect x="58" y="64" width="90" height="5" fill="url(#cherokeeRedAnim)"/>
  <rect x="58" y="64" width="90" height="5" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <!-- Terrace caming -->
  <rect x="55" y="48" width="95" height="21" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- LOWEST TERRACE EXTENSION - Small cantilever toward water -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)" class="hover-effect" style="animation-delay: 1.5s;">
    <rect x="172" y="58" width="45" height="10" fill="url(#concreteMainAnim)" rx="1" class="sunlit"/>
    <rect x="172" y="56" width="45" height="3" fill="url(#concreteLightAnim)" rx="1"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="175" y="68" width="40" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRedAnim)"/>
  <rect x="172" y="56" width="45" height="15" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- STREAM/BEAR RUN - Water at BOTTOM with animation -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <rect x="4" y="82" width="312" height="14" fill="url(#streamFlowPattern)"/>
    <!-- Animated water surface ripples -->
    <ellipse cx="80" cy="87" rx="30" ry="3" fill="#5BA3B5" class="ripple"/>
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="88" rx="25" ry="2" fill="#5BA3B5" class="ripple" style="animation-delay: 1s;"/>
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="86" rx="35" ry="3" fill="#5BA3B5" class="ripple" style="animation-delay: 2s;"/>
    <!-- Small waterfall at rock edge -->
    <rect x="200" y="78" width="6" height="8" fill="#5BA3B5" opacity="0.6">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.6;0.8;0.6" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </rect>
  </g>
  <rect x="4" y="82" width="312" height="14" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- HORIZONTAL LEADING LINES (Prairie rhythm) -->
  <line x1="4" y1="82" x2="316" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="4" y1="75" x2="55" y2="75" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
  <line x1="217" y1="75" x2="316" y2="75" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>

  <!-- Vertical division caming (minimal - horizontal emphasis) -->
  <line x1="55" y1="48" x2="55" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="267" y1="30" x2="267" y2="82" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Corner accents (vegetation green top, water teal bottom) -->
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
</svg>

production_notes:
CORRECTED DESIGN - Key Architectural Corrections:

1. COMPOSITIONAL TRANSFORMATION FROM SAGUARO:
   - Original Saguaro: Three VERTICAL saguaro cacti (left, center-tall, right)
   - ERROR version: Three VERTICAL rock formations with waterfalls
   - CORRECTED: ONE central house mass with 3+ HORIZONTAL cantilevered terraces
   - The single vertical element is now the STONE CHIMNEY at center (not cacti/rocks)
   - Horizontal terraces extend LEFT and RIGHT asymmetrically (not vertical cascades)

2. CRITICAL SHAPE CORRECTIONS:
   - REMOVED: Vertical rock columns with water streaming down
   - ADDED: Horizontal rectangular terrace planes (aspect ratio 8:1 to 10:1)
   - Each terrace has: (a) main concrete plane, (b) bullnose parapet edge, (c) Cherokee red window band below
   - Terraces CANTILEVER beyond the chimney support - showing the famous 'hovering' effect
   - Asymmetric arrangement: Upper terrace left, Middle terrace right, Lower terrace left, Small extension right

3. COLOR PALETTE CORRECTIONS:
   - PRIMARY: Ochre/Buff (#D4A843, #E5D4B3, #C4A67C) for concrete terraces - this is now DOMINANT
   - ACCENT: Cherokee Red (#A52A2A, #8B4513) for steel window frames - VISIBLE horizontal bands
   - ANCHOR: Warm Brown (#8B7355, #6B5344) for sandstone chimney - single vertical mass
   - WATER: Teal (#4A90A4, #5BA3B5) - BOTTOM ONLY (y > 82), NOT cascading down the building
   - FOREST: Deep Sage (#2D5A3D, #4A7C59) - periphery framing, NOT center
   - SKY: Retained warm desert gradient (#E8C895 to #D2B48C) from Saguaro style

4. WATER PLACEMENT CORRECTION:
   - ERROR: Water flowed DOWN vertical rock faces throughout the composition
   - CORRECTED: Water (Bear Run stream) exists ONLY at bottom of composition (y=82 to y=96)
   - The building HOVERS ABOVE the water - clear separation between lowest terrace and stream
   - Small waterfall hint at rock edge (x=200) is subtle, not the focus
   - NO waterfalls cascading down the architecture itself

5. SAGUARO STYLE INFLUENCE (What's retained):
   - Warm earth palette and desert sky gradient
   - Bold geometric clarity and simplicity
   - Strong leading line structure (zinc caming simulation)
   - Corner triangle accents (green top, teal bottom)
   - Glass texture filter for stained glass authenticity

6. SAGUARO STYLE TRANSFORMATION (What's changed):
   - Vertical emphasis (cacti) -> Horizontal emphasis (terraces)
   - Three separate vertical elements -> One unified architectural mass with horizontal extensions
   - Desert plant vocabulary -> Prairie School architectural vocabulary
   - The central 'saguaro' becomes the stone chimney - ONE vertical anchor only

7. ANIMATION APPROACH (Variation 2):
   - Gentle sunlight shimmer on ochre concrete (suggests warm afternoon light)
   - Subtle heat shimmer above stone chimney
   - Cherokee red steel bands have warm glow animation
   - Water ripples flow HORIZONTALLY (stream direction), not downward
   - Very subtle 'hover' effect on terraces reinforces cantilever
   - NO vertical water cascade animations

8. STAINED GLASS TECHNIQUES:
   - Zinc caming simulation (#3D3226) with 1-1.5px strokes
   - Horizontal leading dominates (Prairie School rhythm)
   - Minimal vertical leading (only for chimney and edge divisions)
   - Glass texture filter maintains authentic stained glass appearance
   - Rounded parapet edges (rx=1-2) match Wright's actual 26-inch bullnose parapets

9. CHECKLIST VERIFICATION:
   [X] Architecture clearly identifiable as a BUILDING (not water/rocks)
   [X] 3+ distinct horizontal terrace planes visible
   [X] Ochre/buff is dominant color
   [X] Cherokee red present as accent on steel bands
   [X] Water confined to LOWER portion (y > 82)
   [X] Overall composition reads HORIZONTAL
   [X] Central vertical anchor (stone chimney) present
   [X] Terraces visibly cantilever beyond support
   [X] Would Frank Lloyd Wright recognize this as Fallingwater? YES
